C1310D_LVL_CONSCS_CD Delirium: Altered level of consciousness After completing the patient's BIMs interview, there is evidence that the patient has an altered level of consciousness,
as indicated by any of the following criteria?
 -vigilant: startled easily to any sound or touch
 -lethargic: repeatedly dozed off when being asked questions, but responded to voice or touch
 -stuporous: very difficult to arouse and keep aroused for the interview
 -comatose: could
